## v1.0.32 — Fix Install Addons Python script path in packaged app

### Fix
- **Install Addons** no longer passes `install-addons-pip.py` from inside `app.asar` to Python (which cannot execute archived scripts). Bundled script resolution now prefers `app.asar.unpacked` for `.py` and `.sh` helpers.
- Ship `scripts/lib/gpu_vendor.py` and `scripts/lib/__init__.py` so the pip install script can import GPU vendor selection in production.

### Packaging
- Extended packaging regression tests for unpacked Python script resolution and pip support modules.

Existing installs should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
